name: Five Fragrant Spice Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into 2x1-inch strips.
2. In a medium bowl, toss pork strips with soy sauce, sherry, sugar, salt, five-spice powder, and cornstarch until evenly coated. Let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat until smoking. Add pork and stir-fry until cooked, about 3 to 4 minutes.
Prep: 10 minutes
Stand: 10 minutes
Cook: 3 to 4 minutes
